arts.ttl: Who is Divin Mubama? Man City's forgotten £2m summer signing in squad vs Manchester United
arts.sum: Manchester City signed striker Divin Mubama from West Ham in the summer but he has not been seen since.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho made to train by Manchester United coach Ruben Amorim hours before derby squad snub
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho are the two standout omissions from the Man United squad at Premier League champions Man City.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Man United confirmed lineups: Phil Foden decision made as Ruben Amorim makes four changes for Manchester derby
arts.sum: Man City and Man United confirm their starting lineups for this afternoon's 195th Manchester derby at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford & Alejandro Garnacho left out of Man Utd squad to face Man City
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho have been left out of the Man Utd squad to face Man City.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford left OUT of Man Utd squad vs Man City as Ruben Amorim names XI
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been tipped to leave Manchester United in the January transfer window and he's now been left out of Ruben Amorim's squad for their derby clash with Man City

arts.ttl: Manchester City v Manchester United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from 4.30pm GMT Live scoreboard | And mail Simon The teams news is in, and the starting XIs look like this: Manchester City: Ederson; Walker, Gvardiol, Rúben Dias, Matheus Nunes; Gundogan, De Bruyne, Bernardo Silva; Foden, Doku, Haaland. Manchester United: Onana; De Ligt, Maguire, Licha Martinez; Mazraoui, Ugarte, Fernandes, Dalot; Amad Diallo, Mount, Hojlund. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho are LEFT OUT of Man United's squad as Ruben Amorim makes three changes from Nottingham Forest loss for derby match at Man City
arts.sum: The £325,000-a-week star struggled in midweek against Viktoria Plzen and just days after Mail Sport revealed that United are willing to listen to offers of £40m for him in January, Rashford has been left out.

arts.ttl: Man City looking into Pogba move - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester City weigh up a move for Paul Pogba, Newcastle United interested in West Ham's Mohammed Kudus, Bayern Munich rule out signing a Harry Kane replacement in January, plus more.

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba has already explained Man City transfer stance after Man United 'problems'
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly interested in signing Paul Pogba with the former Manchester United player available on a free transfer

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Manchester United - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola's side host Ruben Amorim's Red Devils at the Etihad
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest team news, updates and live score from the Premier League clash between Manchester City and Manchester United at the Etihad.
